positive: A cheerful, stylized portrait of a group of anthropomorphic woodland animals (raccoons, squirrels, hedgehogs) having a picnic in a field of wildflowers. The style is bright, cheerful, and highly decorative, resembling Japanese kawaii art mixed with storybook watercolor. The lighting is bright, sunny, and airy, emphasizing fresh greens and pastels. Details include gingham blankets, wicker baskets, and tiny decorative elements, wholesome, positive energy, vector art, high saturation, Disney-inspired, 8k quality.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, scary, dark, grunge, messy, realistic fur, dramatic lighting, gore
